prompt: A [product type] in an extreme close-up macro shot — [lens] so close that the product's surface fills the entire frame, no background, no context, only [material surface] in photorealistic detail, [light source] raking at a very low angle to reveal surface texture as three-dimensional relief, [color detail] visible in the material at this scale that would be invisible from a normal viewing distance, cinematic macro still, 16:9. Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
